infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Bushrann to access your photos to update your profile picture.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Allow Bushrann to save videos to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow Bushrann to access your camera to take a profile photo and record videos.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow Bushrann to access your microphone for live streaming and video recording.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Allow Bushrann to use Face ID for secure and quick sign in.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Allow Bushrann to use Face ID for sign in

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Bushrann to access your photos to update your profile picture.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Bushrann to access your camera to take a profile photo.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Bushrann to access your photos.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow Bushrann to save videos to your photo library.
